title: omphalodes luciliae
intro: Omphalodes luciliae, also known as Blue-eyed Mary, is a flowering plant in the forget-me-not family (Boraginaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Omphalodes luciliae include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Omphalodes luciliae is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
